=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFnTryPromise.ts ---
// refactor: 5:28-5:29
// @effect-v3
import * as T from "effect/Effect"

export async function refacpipe(t)orMe(arg: string) {
  for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
    await Promise.resolve(i)
  }
  return await Promise.resolve(arg)
}


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Rewrite to Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFnTryPromise.ts ---
// refactor: 5:28-5:29
// @effect-v3
import * as T from "effect/Effect"

export function refactorMe(arg: string) {
    return T.gen(function* () {
        for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            yield* T.promise(() => Promise.resolve(i));
        }
        return yield* T.promise(() => Promise.resolve(arg));
    });
}


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Rewrite to Effect.gen with failures" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFnTryPromise.ts ---
// refactor: 5:28-5:29
// @effect-v3
import * as T from "effect/Effect"

export class Error1 extends Data.TaggedError("Error1")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

export class Error2 extends Data.TaggedError("Error2")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

export function refactorMe(arg: string) {
    return T.gen(function* () {
        for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            yield* T.tryPromise({ try: () => Promise.resolve(i), catch: cause => new Error1({ cause }) });
        }
        return yield* T.tryPromise({ try: () => Promise.resolve(arg), catch: cause => new Error2({ cause }) });
    });
}


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Rewrite to Effect.fn" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFnTryPromise.ts ---
// refactor: 5:28-5:29
// @effect-v3
import * as T from "effect/Effect"

export const refactorMe = T.fn("refactorMe")(function* (arg: string) {
    for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
        yield* T.promise(() => Promise.resolve(i));
    }
    return yield* T.promise(() => Promise.resolve(arg));
});


=== [R1] Refactor 4: "Rewrite to Effect.fn with failures" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFnTryPromise.ts ---
// refactor: 5:28-5:29
// @effect-v3
import * as T from "effect/Effect"

export class Error1 extends Data.TaggedError("Error1")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

export class Error2 extends Data.TaggedError("Error2")<{
    cause: unknown;
}> {}

export const refactorMe = T.fn("refactorMe")(function* (arg: string) {
    for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
        yield* T.tryPromise({ try: () => Promise.resolve(i), catch: cause => new Error1({ cause }) });
    }
    return yield* T.tryPromise({ try: () => Promise.resolve(arg), catch: cause => new Error2({ cause }) });
});


=== [R1] Refactor 5: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/asyncAwaitToFnTryPromise.ts ---
// refactor: 5:28-5:29
// @effect-v3
import * as T from "effect/Effect"

export async function refactorMe(arg: string): Promise<string> {
  for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
    await Promise.resolve(i)
  }
  return await Promise.resolve(arg)
}
